prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组最低位次分别为 138→150→143→141→134 名，整体在 130–150 名区间窄幅波动，近 5 年极差仅 16 名，走势极为稳定；2025 年基准约 134 名，为近 5 年最优水平；该校在内蒙古理科组招生计划 2021–2025 年均为 25 人，2026 年计划仍为 25 人，连续 6 年保持不变，招生规模对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为 985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名 2021–2026 年连续稳居第 3 名，属全国顶尖高校，对高分考生有持续强吸引力；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、校园安全等事件，可能轻微抑制部分考生的报考热情；但抖音热度总排名第 14 位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位。2021–2025 年未见明显投档断档记录；浙江大学拥有 39 个 A- 及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、临床医学等均为 A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对理科考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 内蒙古 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 154000 人，较 2025 年（物理类 83716+历史类 32644=116360）大幅增加约 32%；按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 110880 人，竞争基数显著扩大。；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，距内蒙古较远，属跨省报考；该校在内蒙古招生计划稳定，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定在 130–150 名区间、招生计划连续 6 年持平、2026 年本省考生大幅增加约 32% 带来竞争加剧、声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用等因素，在 2025 年基准 134 名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约144名，区间94–194名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 138, 150, 143, 141, and 134 respectively, fluctuating narrowly within the 130–150 range, with a range of only 16 over the past 5 years, showing extremely stable trends; the 2025 baseline is approximately 134, the best level in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia was 25 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 25, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with enrollment scale having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national university with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct, campus safety incidents, etc., which may mildly suppress some candidates' enthusiasm; however, it ranks 14th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high overall attention. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded from 2021 to 2025; Zhejiang University has 39 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine, all rated A+, with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (116,360: 83,716 in physics category + 32,644 in history category); based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 110,880, significantly expanding the competition base. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, far from Inner Mongolia, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia is stable, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings in the 130–150 range, the enrollment plan unchanged for 6 consecutive years, the significant increase of about 32% in local candidates in 2026 intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation with mild suppression, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 134; the predicted minimum ranking is about 144, with a range of 94–194.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 144, range 94–194. Candidates with rankings within 94 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class and other flagship majors; candidates with rankings in the 94–144 range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Information and EE categories, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings in the 144–194 range are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2 for safe application.
